findings.description: Section s4 is titled "Excel„Āł„ĀģŚģöÁĺ©" (a subsection label in the source), but its content covers the entire parent section `„ā≥„É≥„āĻ„Éą„É©„āĮ„āŅ„ĀęŚĮĺ„Āô„āč„ÉÜ„āĻ„Éą„āĪ„Éľ„āĻ` including its introductory paragraphs, the `Excel„Āł„ĀģŚģöÁĺ©` subsection, and the `test-constructor-java-label` test code block. The misleading title may cause AI to miss constructor-test content when the user asks about it under the parent heading name.
findings.source_evidence: Source heading hierarchy: `„ā≥„É≥„āĻ„Éą„É©„āĮ„āŅ„ĀęŚĮĺ„Āô„āč„ÉÜ„āĻ„Éą„āĪ„Éľ„āĻ` (====) > `Excel„Āł„ĀģŚģöÁĺ©` (----) > `test-constructor-java-label` label. Knowledge s4 merges all three but is titled only after the subsection.

findings.description: s6 hints include MSG00010 and MSG00011 but omit MSG00023, which appears as the value of fixLengthMessageId in both the validator config XML and the EntityTestConfiguration XML shown in s6.
findings.source_evidence: Source s6 XML: `<property name="fixLengthMessageId" value="MSG00023"/>` appears in both code blocks.
